self_report.numeric_verdict: Integral values at y=1/2, 3/4, 9/10, 99/100 are 0.1362, 0.2177, 0.2719, 0.3246, all below 1/3≈0.3333, with the value reaching exactly 1/3 at y=1 (where y−y²=0 and the integrand reduces to x²).
self_report.notes: Using sqrt(x^4+c^2) ≤ x^2 + c (with c=y−y^2 ≥ 0), the integral is ≤ y^2 − 2y^3/3 which is monotonically increasing on [0,1] with maximum 1/3 at y=1; numerics confirm this.
